case_title: CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO A MUNICIPAL VS CAMERA REGIS, INC. DBA CAMELOT COCKTAIL LOUNGE

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,211.89 FILED BY CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO A MUNICIPAL CORPORATION, INVESTIGATION DIVISION ROOM 220 AS TO DEFENDANT CAMERA REGIS, INC. DBA CAMELOT COCKTAIL LOUNGE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-15-1992 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 02
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT CAMERA REGIS, INC. DBA CAMELOT COCKTAIL LOUNGE

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO A MUNICIPAL CORPORATION, INVESTIGATION DIVISION ROOM 220 RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CAMERA REGIS, INC. DBA CAMELOT COCKTAIL LOUNGE $1,211.89 PRINCIPAL, $14.79 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,226.68 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT CAMERA REGIS, INC. DBA CAMELOT COCKTAIL LOUNGE
